name: Lost Baggage Protection
description: Comprehensive coverage for lost, damaged, or stolen checked baggage during your journey
claimCondition: Baggage must be reported lost within 24 hours at airport. Original baggage tags and property irregularity report required.

name: Baggage Delay Coverage
description: Reimbursement for essential purchases when your checked baggage is delayed
claimCondition: Baggage delayed for 6+ hours. Receipts for essential items required. Max $100 per day.

name: Baggage Assistance Service
description: 24/7 assistance for baggage tracking, delivery, and coordination with airlines
claimCondition: Available for all baggage-related issues. Contact emergency number for immediate assistance.

name: Personal Accident Insurance
description: Coverage for accidental death or permanent disablement during travel
claimCondition: Accident must occur during covered journey. Medical reports and death certificates required for claims.

name: Trip Delay Protection
description: Compensation for expenses incurred due to significant flight delays
claimCondition: Delay of 4+ hours. Covers meals, accommodation, and transportation up to $200/day.

name: Trip Cancellation Coverage
description: Refund for non-refundable trip costs if you must cancel for covered reasons
claimCondition: Covered reasons: illness, injury, death of family member, jury duty, natural disaster. Documentation required.

name: Missed Connection Assistance
description: Coverage for expenses when you miss a connecting flight due to delay of preceding flight
claimCondition: Missed connection due to covered carrier delay of 3+ hours. Covers meals and accommodation.

name: Flight Diversion Coverage
description: Compensation for additional expenses when your flight is diverted to another airport
claimCondition: Covered when flight diverted to airport 100+ miles from original destination. Covers ground transportation.

name: Free Date Change
description: Waiver of change fees for one date modification
claimCondition: One free date change permitted up to 24 hours before departure. Fare difference may apply.

name: Zero Cancellation Protection
description: Full refund for cancellations made up to 24 hours before departure
claimCondition: Cancel anytime up to 24h before departure for 100% refund. After 24h, standard cancellation policy applies.

name: 24/7 Emergency Assistance
description: Round-the-clock support for medical, legal, and travel emergencies
claimCondition: Immediate assistance for emergencies. Includes medical referral, legal referral, and travel arrangements.

name: Travel Document Loss Coverage
description: Assistance and reimbursement for lost or stolen passports, visas, and travel documents
claimCondition: Covers replacement fees and emergency transportation arrangements. Police report required.

name: Medical Emergency Coverage
description: Coverage for emergency medical treatment and evacuation during travel
claimCondition: Covers emergency medical expenses, hospitalization, and medical evacuation to home country.
